meaning: vt.使牵连其中,含意,暗示n.包含的东西
examples: The results implicate poor hygiene as one cause of the outbreak.
He tried to avoid saying anything that would implicate him further.
Eight of them involve business litigants or implicate issues that affect our free enterprise system.
Experiments in simpler organisms like worms and yeast have also seemed to implicate mTOR in the aging process.
